title: abutilon erythraeum
intro: Abutilon erythraeum is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the hollyhock tree or Indian mallow. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Abutilon erythraeum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
